old_value: {"id":"syl-87a","title":"Capability-gap detection: detect refusals and file feature inbox item","description":"After Claude responds, a background step should detect refusal/capability-gap patterns in the response (e.g. 'I don't have access', 'I cannot', 'I'm unable to'). When detected, enqueue an inbox_write job with a structured description of the missing capability (original ask + response snippet). Also publish an SSE 'token' event to the user saying a feature request was submitted.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"seth.ammons@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T19:10:51Z","created_by":"Seth Ammons","updated_at":"2026-03-12T19:10:51Z"}

{"id":"syl-nkw","title":"Inbox-driven feature development: list open feature requests","description":"When user asks 'show me open feature requests' or similar, the classifier routes to a new job type that reads inbox items tagged as feature_request category, formats them with original ask + Syl response snippet as context, and streams the list back via SSE. This enables Claude to inspect its own capability gaps and work through them with the user.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"seth.ammons@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T19:10:54Z","created_by":"Seth Ammons","updated_at":"2026-03-12T19:10:54Z"}
